utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance and an explicit cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance and cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance and cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes an enhancement service (professional liability) with a cost. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual breakdown. Fully specified. All 5 items are present and include the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract each item from the final coverage plan and find the exact matching option name in the ground-truth ratings. Map to the corresponding numeric rating. Items found: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home contents insurance), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance). The 'Estimated Professional Liability Policy' is not present in ground-truth, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted.
